span.p:
🛡️ 1. Code Quality Checks
├─ Checkout & Setup Node v20
├─ Install Dependencies (npm ci)
├─ 🧹 ESLint (Check Syntax)
├─ 🏷️ TypeScript (Check Types)
└─ 🧪 Vitest (Run Unit Tests)

div.style: color: rgb(36, 41, 47) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🗄️ 2. Database Migration
├─ Checkout & Setup Node v20
├─ Install Dependencies (npm ci)
├─ Verify Connection (DATABASE_URL)
└─ Push Schema (drizzle-kit push)

div.style: color: rgb(36, 41, 47) !important; font-weight: bold !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
🤖 3. E2E Tests (Playwright)
├─ Checkout & Setup Node v20
├─ Install Dependencies (npm ci)
├─ Build Next.js App for Production
├─ Install Headless Browsers
├─ Run UI Automation Tests
└─ Upload Artifacts (Reports & Video)
